title: NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: The National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Tiruchirappalli) has officially announced the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been released on the official NIT Tiruchirappalli website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 35 years and hold an M.E./M.Tech degree in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Information Technology (IT), or Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) can submit their offline applications up to 13-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per norms.

qualification.details: M.E/M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Information Technology (IT), or Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
